changeSet.author: nexus-2zv75
changeSet.comment: Append stale_source_ratio to collection_health_meta (source_mtime vs indexed_at)
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW nexus.collection_health_meta WITH (security_invoker = true) AS SELECT d.tenant_id, d.physical_collection AS collection, max(d.indexed_at) AS last_indexed, count(*) FILTER ( WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_links l WHERE l.to_tumbler = d.tumbler ) ) AS orphan_count, (count(*) FILTER ( WHERE d.source_mtime > 0 AND d.indexed_at ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}' AND d.source_mtime > extract(epoch FROM d.indexed_at::timestamptz) ))::double precision / NULLIF(count(*) FILTER (WHERE d.source_mtime > 0), 0) AS stale_source_ratio FROM nexus.catalog_documents d WHERE d.physical_collection IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.tenant_id, d.physical_collection
